# Task: Fix calibrationBaseline missing from fast-mode init and update (#55)

> Task ID: FORGE-S11-T05
> Sprint: [FORGE-S11](../INDEX.md)
> Status: ✅ committed
> Estimate: M

## Description

/forge:init --fast bypasses Phase 5/6-b where calibrationBaseline is written, leaving config.json without it. /forge:update also does not refresh it. Fix: write calibrationBaseline after Phase 7-fast stub writes; refresh in update after successful artifact materialization.
